description: Milestone 3 data-backed authority-family rule templates for source-currentness-confirmed Region 1 EA authority families that are not base compliance-rule-pack rules.

templates.title: Clean Air Act, general conformity, smoke, and air-quality coordination applicability template
templates.question: Does the EA package contain project facts that trigger Clean Air Act, general conformity, smoke, and air-quality coordination?
templates.requirement: When package facts trigger Clean Air Act, general conformity, smoke, and air-quality coordination, reviewers should evaluate the applicable authority using cited source-library evidence before creating compliance findings.
templates.package_query: air quality OR emissions OR prescribed fire smoke OR smoke OR conformity OR general conformity OR nonattainment area OR maintenance area
templates.source_query: Clean Air Act, general conformity, smoke, and air-quality coordination Clean Air Act, 42 U.S.C. chapter 85
source_evidence_requirements: Clean Air Act or conformity regulation source
package evidence for emissions, prescribed fire smoke, conformity, nonattainment/maintenance area, or air-quality permit/coordination
templates.evidence_expectation: A supported applicability decision requires a catalog-confirmed authority source and package evidence matching the positive or negative trigger contract.

templates.title: Clean Water Act, waters of the United States, and water permit/certification sources applicability template
templates.question: Does the EA package contain project facts that trigger Clean Water Act, waters of the United States, and water permit/certification sources?
templates.requirement: When package facts trigger Clean Water Act, waters of the United States, and water permit/certification sources, reviewers should evaluate the applicable authority using cited source-library evidence before creating compliance findings.
templates.package_query: Clean Water Act OR CWA OR waters of the United States OR wetlands OR stream OR discharge OR dredge OR fill
does_not_apply_if_package_terms: no waters of the United States
templates.source_query: Clean Water Act, waters of the United States, and water permit/certification sources Clean Water Act, 33 U.S.C. chapter 26
source_evidence_requirements: CWA/Corps/state water source
package evidence for waters, wetlands, discharge, dredge/fill, stormwater/NPDES, water-quality certification, DA permit, or state permit triggers
templates.evidence_expectation: A supported applicability decision requires a catalog-confirmed authority source and package evidence matching the positive or negative trigger contract.

templates.title: Cultural-resource protection, ARPA/NAGPRA/AIRFA/RFRA, and state SHPO sources applicability template
templates.question: Does the EA package contain project facts that trigger Cultural-resource protection, ARPA/NAGPRA/AIRFA/RFRA, and state SHPO sources?
templates.requirement: When package facts trigger Cultural-resource protection, ARPA/NAGPRA/AIRFA/RFRA, and state SHPO sources, reviewers should evaluate the applicable authority using cited source-library evidence before creating compliance findings.
templates.package_query: historic property OR cultural resource OR archaeological resource OR archeological resource OR SHPO OR THPO OR NAGPRA OR Native American remains
templates.source_query: Cultural-resource protection, ARPA/NAGPRA/AIRFA/RFRA, and state SHPO sources NHPA § 110 federal agency preservation responsibilities, 54 U.S.C. chapter 3061
source_evidence_requirements: cultural-resource law/regulation/SHPO source
package evidence for historic properties, archaeological resources, Native American remains/items, sacred sites, religious exercise, or state SHPO coordination
paleontology and cave-resource source evidence when project facts trigger those special cultural/resource protections
templates.evidence_expectation: A supported applicability decision requires a catalog-confirmed authority source and package evidence matching the positive or negative trigger contract.

source_evidence_requirements: eagle or EFH source
package evidence for eagle take/disturbance/nests, EFH, fish habitat, or consultation triggers
templates.evidence_expectation: A supported applicability decision requires a catalog-confirmed authority source and package evidence matching the positive or negative trigger contract.

package evidence for floodplain occupancy, alteration, or effects

source_evidence_requirements: CERCLA/RCRA/NCP source
package evidence for hazardous substance release, solid/hazardous waste, cleanup, exposure, facility, mine feature, land acquisition/disposal, or spill response
